# Ajitesh Panda

> Software Engineer at Goldcast (Ex-HackerRank). Hi! Thanks a lot for visiting my site. My name is Ajitesh, and I am a software engineer currently working as an SDE at Goldcast. Previously I was working on HackerRank. I completed my BTech in Computer Science and Engineering from IIIT Bhubaneswar, graduating in 2022.

## Pages
- [Home](https://ajitesh13.github.io/): Bio, career timeline, and current ventures
- [Projects](https://ajitesh13.github.io/projects): Software projects and open source work
- [Blog](https://ajitesh13.github.io/blogs): Writing on web development, LLMs, and engineering
- [Books](https://ajitesh13.github.io/books): Book reviews and reading notes
- [Through My Lens](https://ajitesh13.github.io/posts): Photography
- [Resume](https://ajitesh13.github.io/resume): Experience and education

## Blog Posts
- [My Journey with Next.js 15](https://ajitesh13.github.io/blogs/my-journey-with-next-js-15): Exploring the latest features and my experience upgrading to Next.js 15 with the App Router and Turbopack

## Projects
- [Grimlock](https://ajitesh13.github.io/works/grimlock): Open-source E2EE chat infra, extracted from Privyy.
- [Lookover](https://ajitesh13.github.io/works/lookover): The black box recorder for AI agents.
- [Privyy](https://ajitesh13.github.io/works/privyy): End-to-end encrypted LLM chat infrastructure.
- [Clarity](https://ajitesh13.github.io/works/clarity): Your AI journaling assistant
- [FamTrack](https://ajitesh13.github.io/works/famtrack): A mobile app for family safety with geofencing
- [Webedge](https://ajitesh13.github.io/works/webedge): Bring edge to your web performance
- [Webextension Activity Monitor](https://ajitesh13.github.io/works/activitymonitor): A Webextension to track the activity of other webextensions

## Books
- [Atomic Habits by James Clear](https://ajitesh13.github.io/books/atomic-habits)
- [Deep Work by Cal Newport](https://ajitesh13.github.io/books/deep-work)

## Photo Essays
- [Cherry Blossoms in Spring](https://ajitesh13.github.io/posts/cherry-blossoms-2024): Tokyo, Japan
- [Traditional Machiya Streets](https://ajitesh13.github.io/posts/machiya-streets): Kyoto, Japan
